# 🧠 Paquito Hub — ESPECIFICACIÓN ULTRA PRO (FULL AUTOGENERATED)

## 🎯 OBJETIVO

Construir un sistema completo listo para:
- Generarse automáticamente con Antigravity
- Subirse a GitHub
- Clonarse y desplegarse en CT 102 sin tocar nada

---

# 🏗️ ARQUITECTURA

Frontend (HTML + JS)
Backend (Node.js + Express)
IA local (Ollama)
Sistema (scripts bash)
OpenClaw (API externa)

---

# ⚙️ BACKEND REAL (server/server.js)

```javascript
const express = require('express');
const app = express();
const actionRoutes = require('./routes/action');
const openclawRoutes = require('./routes/openclaw');
const ollamaRoutes = require('./routes/ollama');

app.use(express.json());

app.use('/api/action', actionRoutes);
app.use('/api/openclaw', openclawRoutes);
app.use('/api/ollama', ollamaRoutes);

app.get('/api/status', (req, res) => {
    res.json({ status: "ok" });
});

app.listen(3000, () => console.log("Paquito Hub running"));
```

---

# ⚙️ EXECUTOR (services/executor.js)

```javascript
const { exec } = require('child_process');

const actions = {
    check_openclaw: './scripts/check_openclaw.sh',
    restart_openclaw: './scripts/restart_openclaw.sh',
    logs_openclaw: './scripts/logs_openclaw.sh'
};

function runAction(action) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        if (!actions[action]) return reject("Acción no permitida");

        exec(actions[action], (err, stdout, stderr) => {
            if (err) return reject(stderr);
            resolve(stdout);
        });
    });
}

module.exports = { runAction };
```

---

# 🤖 CLASIFICADOR (services/classifier.js)

```javascript
const axios = require('axios');

async function classify(message) {
    const prompt = `
Convierte este mensaje en una acción:
"${message}"

Opciones:
- check_openclaw
- restart_openclaw
- logs_openclaw

Responde solo JSON:
{ "action": "xxx" }
`;

    const res = await axios.post('http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate', {
        model: 'phi3',
        prompt,
        stream: false
    });

    return JSON.parse(res.data.response);
}

module.exports = { classify };
```

---

# 📜 SCRIPTS COMPLETOS

## check_openclaw.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
systemctl status openclaw | head -n 20
```

## restart_openclaw.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
systemctl restart openclaw
echo "OpenClaw reiniciado"
```

## logs_openclaw.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
tail -n 50 /tmp/openclaw/*.log
```

## check_dns.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
cat /etc/resolv.conf
ping -c 1 google.com
```

## check_containers.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
pct list
```

## check_disk.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
df -h
```

## check_ram.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
free -h
```

## check_ollama.sh
```bash
#!/bin/bash
curl http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags
```

---

# 🌐 FRONTEND BÁSICO

```html
<button onclick="send('check_openclaw')">Estado</button>
<button onclick="send('restart_openclaw')">Reiniciar</button>
<pre id="out"></pre>

<script>
async function send(action){
 const res = await fetch('/api/action',{
  method:'POST',
  headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
  body: JSON.stringify({action})
 });
 const data = await res.text();
 document.getElementById('out').innerText = data;
}
</script>
```

---

# 🐳 DOCKER

```yaml
version: "3.8"
services:
  hub:
    image: node:20
    working_dir: /app
    volumes:
      - .:/app
    command: sh -c "npm install && node server/server.js"
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    restart: always
```

}

```bash

cd paquito-hub
docker compose up -d
```
